title: Fix test syntax
body:
Remove the use of bash -c unless it involves a bash pipe. Also, use
run test_runner.sh inside script so that centos can be happy.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM! Let's hope this helps end our testing woes
Red Hat CI is not happy in a few tests.

:pushpin: Commit 6da4862 has been approved by `baude`

:zap: Test exempted: pull fully rebased and already tested.
